tAir: Temperature of the air in the main compartment of the greenhouse (below the screen)
tTop: Temperature of the air in the top compartment of the greenhouse (above the screen)
tCovIn: Temperature of the internal side of the greenhouse cover
tCovE: Temperature of the internal side of the greenhouse cover
tPipe: Temperature of the pipe rail heating pipe
vpAir: Vapour pressure of the air in the main compartment of the greenhouse (below the screen)
vpTop: Vapour pressure of the air in the top compartment of the greenhouse (above the screen)
co2Air: CO2 concentration of the air in the main compartment of the greenhouse (below the screen)
co2Top: CO2 concentration of the air in the top compartment of the greenhouse (above the screen)
tCan24: Average Canopy Temperature in previous 24 Hours
tGroPipe: Temperature of the grow pipe heating pipe
dayRadSum: Daily sum of outdoor global solar radiation
isDay: Switch determining if it is day or night. Used for control purposes
isDaySmooth: Smooth switch determining if it is day or night. Used for control purposes
hAirFlr: Convection between air in main compartment and floor
etaRoof: Fraction of ventilation through roof vents. Override avoids 0/0 when aRoof=aSide=0.
etaSide: Fraction of ventilation through side vents. Override avoids 0/0 when aRoof=aSide=0.
xPad: Water vapour content of the pad
co2InPpm: CO2 concentration in main compartment - Converted to ppm
uBoil: Control of boiler to pipe rail. Overridden to 0: no boiler or pipes present.
uHeatInd: Control of the heat input from an industrial source
uHeatGeo: Control of the heat input from geothermal source
uPad: Control of the pad and fan
uRoof: Roof vent control. Overridden to 0: no roof vents present. Ventilation is handled entirely by uVentForced.
uExtCo2: CO2 injection control. Overridden to 0: no CO2 enrichment system present.
uShScr: Closure of external shading screen, 0 is open (folded screen), 1 is closed (spread out screen)
uShScrPer: Closure of semi-permanent shading screen (whitewash), 0 is open (no whitewash), 1 is closed (whitewash applied)
uThScr: Thermal screen control. Overridden to 0: no thermal screen present.
gTCan24: Temperature effect on structural carbon flow to organs
hBufHotPipe: Energy from the hot buffer to the heating pipes
tauLampFir: Transmissivity of toplight lamp layer to FIR
uBoilGro: Control of boiler to grow pipes. Overridden to 0: no grow pipes present.
rhIn: Relative humidity of the indoor air
lampTimeOfDay: Control of the lamp according to the time of day
lampDayOfYear: Control of the lamp according to the day of year
linearLampSwitchOn: Linear version of lamp switch on
linearLampSwitchOff: Linear version of lamp switching off
linearLampBothSwitches: Linear transition between lamp on and lamp off
mechAllowed: Decision on whether mechanical cooling and dehumidification is allowed to work
hotBufAllowed: Decision on whether heating from buffer is allowed to run
tauShScrLayerPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauShScrPerLayerPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the semi-permanent shading screen (whether it is deployed or not)
rhoShScrLayerPar: PAR reflection coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoShScrPerLayerPar: PAR reflection coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the screen (whether it is deployed or not)
tauShScrShScrPerPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer
rhoShScrShScrPerParUp: PAR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the top
rhoShScrShScrPerParDn: PAR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the bottom
tauThScrLayerPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the thermal screen "layer": the vertical area of the thermal screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoThScrLayerPar: PAR reflection coefficient of the thermal screen "layer": the vertical area of the thermal screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauRfThScrPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the thermal screen and roof combined layer
rhoRfThScrParUp: PAR reflection coefficient of the thermal screen and roof combined layer towards the top
rhoRfThScrParDn: PAR reflection coefficient of the thermal screen and roof combined layer towards the bottom
tauCovParVanthoor: PAR transmission coefficient of the cover
rhoCovParVanthoorUp: PAR reflection coefficient of the cover towards the top
rhoCovParVanthoorDn: PAR reflection coefficient of the cover towards the top
tauShScrLayerNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauShScrPerLayerNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the semi-permanent shading screen (whether it is deployed or not)
rhoShScrLayerNir: NIR reflection coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoShScrPerLayerNir: NIR reflection coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the semi-permanent shading screen (whether it is deployed or not)
tauShScrShScrPerNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer
rhoShScrShScrPerNirUp: NIR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the top
rhoShScrShScrPerNirDn: NIR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the bottom
tauThScrLayerNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the thermal screen "layer": the vertical area of the thermal screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoThScrLayerNir: NIR reflection coefficient of the thermal screen "layer": the vertical area of the thermal screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauRfThScrNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the thermal screen and roof combined layer
rhoRfThScrNirUp: NIR reflection coefficient of the thermal screen and roof combined layer towards the top
rhoRfThScrNirDn: NIR reflection coefficient of the thermal screen and roof combined layer towards the bottom
tauCovNirVanthoor: NIR transmission coefficient of the cover
rhoCovNirVanthoorUp: NIR reflection coefficient of the cover towards the top
rhoCovNirVanthoorDn: NIR reflection coefficient of the cover towards the top
tauShScrLayerFir: FIR transmission coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauShScrPerLayerFir: FIR transmission coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the semi-permanent shading screen (whether it is deployed or not)
rhoShScrLayerFir: FIR reflection coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoShScrPerLayerFir: FIR reflection coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the semi-permanent shading screen (whether it is deployed or not)
tauShScrShScrPerFir: FIR transmission coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer
rhoShScrShScrPerFirUp: FIR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the top
rhoShScrShScrPerFirDn: FIR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the bottom
tauCovFir: FIR transmission coefficient of the cover
rhoCovFir: FIR reflection coefficient of the cover
epsCovFir: FIR emission coefficient of the cover
capCov: Heat capacity of the lumped cover
hecCovInCovE: Heat exchange coefficient through the lumped cover
capVpAir: Vapour pressure capacity of main compartment - below the screen
capVpTop: Vapour pressure capacity of top compartment - above the screen
tauHatFlrNir: Virtual NIR transmission for the cover-canopy-floor lumped model
tauThScrFirU: FIR transmission coefficient of the thermal screen
rThScrCovIn: FIR between thermal screen and cover
rThScrSky: FIR between thermal screen and sky
hAirThScr: Convection between air in main compartment and thermal screen
hThScrTop: Convection between thermal screen and air in top compartment
hTopCovIn: Convection between air in top compartment and cover
hCovEOut: Convection between cover and outside air
hPipeAir: Convection between pipes and air in main compartment
hFlrSo1: Conduction between floor and soil layer 1
hSo5SoOut: Conduction between soil layer 5 and the external soil layer
hCovInCovE: Conductive heat flux through the lumped cover
mvAirThScr: Condensation from main compartment on thermal screen - Vapour fluxes
mvTopCovIn: Condensation from top compartment to cover - Vapour fluxes
hBoilPipe: Heat flux from the boiler to the heating pipe
hIndPipe: Heat flux from an industrial source to the heating pipe
hGeoPipe: Heat flux from a geothermal source to the heating pipe
hPasAir: Heat flux from the buffer to the heating pipe
fPad: Ventilation flux due to the pad and fan system
xOut: Water vapour content of the outdoor air
mvAirOutPad: Vapour flux from the greenhouse air to the outside air due to the pad and fan
mcPadAir: Net CO2 flux from the outside air to the greenhouse due to the pad and fan
hecMechAir: Heat exchange coefficinet between the surface of the mechanical cooling unit and the greenhouse air
hMechAir: Heat flux from the mechanical cooling to the greenhouse air
mvAirMech: Vapour flux from the greenhouse air to the surface of the mechanical cooling system
mvFogAir: Vapour flux from the fogging system to the greenhouse air
lAirFog: Heat flux of the air needed to evaporate the fog
etaInsScr: Ventilation reduction factor due to the insect screen
mcExtAir: CO2 added to the greenhouse by an external CO2 source
j25CanMax: Maximum rate of electron transport rate at 25°C
gamma: CO2 compensation point, - Canopy photosynthesis, - Canopy photosynthesis
hAirBuf: Inhibition due to full carbohydrates buffer
hBufOrg: Inhibition due to insufficient carbohydrates in the buffer
hTCan: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow to the fruit
hTCan24: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow to the organs
fIntLampCanPar: Fraction of PAR from the interlights reaching the canopy
fIntLampCanNir: Fraction of NIR from the interlights reaching the canopy
fIntLampCanUp: Fraction of radiation going up from the interlights to the canopy
fIntLampCanDown: Fraction of radiation going down from the interlights to the canopy
hLampAir: Convective heat exchange between top lamps and air in main compartment
hIntLampAir: Convective heat exchange between interlights and air in main compartment
hGroPipeAir: Convective heat exchange between grow pipes and air in main compartment
hBoilGroPipe: Heat from boiler to grow pipes
hAirMech: Heat flux from the mechanical cooling to the greenhouse air
mvMechAir: Vapour flux from the greenhouse air to the surface of the mechanical cooling system
thScrSp: Setpoint for closing the thermal screen
thScrCold: Closure of the thermal screen based on outdoor temperature
lampNoCons: Control for the lamps disregarding temperature and humidity constraints
smoothLamp: Smooth (linear) approximation of the lamp control
tauHatCanNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the canopy
rhoHatCanNir: NIR reflection coefficient of the canopy
aCan: Surface of canopy per floor area for calculation of FIR exchanges
hCanAir: Convection between canopy and air in main compartment
rhoAir: Density of the air in the main compartment (below the screen)
rhoTop: Density of the air in the top compartment (above the screen)
rhoAirMean: Mean density of the air below and above the screen.
lAirThScr: Latent heat flux by condensation on thermal screen
lTopCovIn: Latent heat flux by condensation on cover
mvPadAir: Vapour flux from the pad and fan to the greenhouse air
hPadAir: Sensible heat flux from the pad to the greenhouse air
hAirOutPad: Sensible heat flux from the greenhouse air to the outside air
fVentRoof2: Natural ventilation rate due to roof ventilation
fVentRoofSide2: Ventilation rate through roof and side vents
mcBufFruit: Carbohydrate flow from buffer to fruit
mcBufLeaf: Carbohydrate flow from buffer to leaves
mcBufStem: Carbohydrate flow from buffer to stems
rGroPipeCan: FIR between grow pipes and canopy
isDayInside: Indicates whether daytime climate settings should be used, i.e., if the sun is out or the lamps are on
heatMax: Ventilation setpoint due to excess heating set point
ventHeat: Ventilation due to excess heat, 0 means vents are closed
ventCold: Ventilation closure due to too cold temperatures
thScrRh: Opening of thermal screen due to high humidity
thScrHeat: Opening of thermal screen closure due to too high temperatures
uLamp: Control for the top lights, 1 if lamps are on, 0 if lamps are off
uIntLamp: Control for the interlights, 1 if interlights are on, 0 if interlights are off
uBlow: Control of forced-air heater. Uses same proportional logic as the boiler (uBoil) since there is no pipe system.
uVentForced: Control of exhaust fans. Fans are driven by the same heat/humidity logic used for roof vents (uRoof), since there are no roof vents.
rNirLampCan: NIR from the lamps absorbed by the canopy
rNirLampFlr: NIR from the lamps absorbed by the floor
rNirIntLampCan: NIR from the interlights absorbed by the canopy
rNirIntLampFlr: NIR from the interlights absorbed by the floor
rCanLamp: Shortwave radiation above the canopy from the lamps (PAR+NIR, where UV is counted together with NIR)
rCanIntLamp: Shortwave radiation outside the canopy from the interlight lamps (PAR+NIR, where UV is counted together with NIR)
uBlScr: Closure of blackout screen, 0 is open (folded screen), 1 is closed (spread out screen)
hBlowAir: Heat flux from direct air heater
mcBlowAir: CO2 flux from direct air heater
mvBlowAir: Vapour flux from direct air heater
fVentForced2: Forced ventilation, not including the insect screen
tauBlScrLayerPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoBlScrLayerPar: PAR reflection coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauCovBlScrPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
rhoCovBlScrParUp: PAR upwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
rhoCovBlScrParDn: PAR downwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
tauBlScrLayerNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoBlScrLayerNir: NIR reflection coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauCovBlScrNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
rhoCovBlScrNirUp: NIR downwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
rhoCovBlScrNirDn: NIR downwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
rParGhLamp: PAR above the canopy from the lamps
rParGhIntLamp: PAR outside the canopy from the interlights
rParLampCanDown: PAR from the lamps directly absorbed by the canopy
rParLampFlrCanUp: PAR from the lamps absorbed by the canopy after reflection from the floor
rParLampCan: Total PAR from the lamps absorbed by the canopy
rParLampFlr: PAR from the lamps absorbed by the floor
rLampAir: PAR and NIR from the lamps absorbed by the greenhouse air
rParIntLampCanDown: PAR from the interlights directly absorbed by the canopy
rParIntLampFlr: PAR from the interlights absorbed by the floor
rParIntLampFlrCanUp: PAR from the interlights absorbed by the canopy after reflection from the floor
rParIntLampCan: Total PAR from the interlights absorbed by the canopy
rIntLampAir: PAR and NIR from the interlights absorbed by the greenhouse air
tauBlScrFirU: FIR transmission coefficient of the blackout screen
rLampThScr: FIR between lamps and thermal screen
rLampBlScr: FIR between lamps and blackout screen
rBlScrSky: FIR between blackout screen and sky
rBlScrCovIn: FIR between blackout screen and cover
rBlScrThScr: FIR between blackout screen and thermal screen
rCanBlScr: FIR between canopy and blackout screen
rPipeBlScr: FIR between blackout screen and pipe
rFlrBlScr: FIR between blackout screen and floor
rIntLampThScr: FIR between interlights and thermal screen
rIntLampBlScr: FIR between interlights and blackout screen
hAirBlScr: Convective heat exchange between air in main compartment (below the screens) and blackout screen
hBlScrTop: Convective heat exchange between air in top compartment (above the screens) and blackout screen
mvAirBlScr: Condensation from main compartment on blackout screen
lAirBlScr: Latent heat flux by condensation on blackout screen
rhoCovPar: PAR reflection coefficient of the cover
tauCovPar: PAR transmission coefficient of the cover
aCovPar: PAR absorption coefficient of the cover
rhoCovNir: NIR reflection coefficient of the cover
tauCovNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the cover
aCovNir: NIR absorption coefficient of the cover
rParGhSun: PAR above the canopy from the sun
rParSunFlrCanUp: PAR from the sun absorbed by the canopy after reflection from the floor
tauHatCovNir: Virtual NIR transmission for the cover-canopy-floor lumped model
tauCovCanNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the cover and canopy
rhoCovCanNirUp: NIR reflection coefficient of the cover and canopy towards the top
rhoCovCanNirDn: NIR reflection coefficient of the cover and canopy towards the bottom
tauCovCanFlrNir: NIR transmission coefficient of the cover, canopy and floor lumped layer
rhoCovCanFlrNir: NIR reflection coefficient of the cover, canopy and floor
aCanNir: The NIR absorption coefficient of the canopy
aFlrNir: The overall NIR absorption coefficient of the floor
rNirSunCan: NIR from the sun absorbed by the canopy
rNirSunFlr: NIR from the sun absorbed by the floor
rParSunFlr: PAR from the sun absorbed by the floor
rGlobSunAir: Global radiation from the sun absorbed by the greenhouse air
rGlobSunCovE: Global radiation from the sun absorbed by the cover
rCanThScr: FIR between canopy and thermal screen
rPipeThScr: FIR between pipes and thermal screen
rFlrThScr: FIR between floor and thermal screen
hAirOut: Convection between air in main compartment and outside air
hTopOut: Convection between air in top compartment and outside air
fScr: Air flux through the screens layer (may include multiple screens)
mvAirTop: Vapour flux from main to top compartment (through the screen layer)
mvAirOut: Vapour flux from main compartment to outside
mvTopOut: Vapour flux from top compartment to outside
mcAirTop: CO2 flux from main to top compartment (through the screen layer)
mcAirOut: Vapour flux from main compartment to outside
mcTopOut: Vapour flux from top compartment to outside
rCanSun: Global radiation (PAR+NIR) above the canopy from the sun
rCan: Global radiation above and outside the canopy (PAR+NIR, where UV is counted together with NIR)
sRs: Smooth switch between day and night, needed to account for difference in day/night transpiration paramemters
cEvap3: Parameter for CO2 influence on stomatal resistance
cEvap4: Parameter for vapour pressure influence on stomatal resistance - Canopy Transpiration
rParSunCanDn: PAR from the sun directly absorbed by the canopy
hAirTop: Convection between air in main and top compartment
rfVp: Vapour pressure influence on stomatal resistance
rParSunCan: Total PAR from the sun absorbed by the canopy
rParCan: Total PAR above and outside the canopy
parCan: Total PAR absorbed by the canopy, expressed in µmol m**-2 s**-1
vecCanAir: Vapour transfer coefficient of canopy transpiration
